expected_or_lead_configuration: GT40 chassis identity determines original build, race history, homologation applicability, and rebuild history.

next_action: Photograph identifiers before cleaning; update vehicle identity worksheet.

expected_or_lead_configuration: Ford GT40 Mk I FIA Recognition/Homologation No. 224 Group 4 is captured from the FIA Historic Database, including 1968 extensions for cylinder head, 4942cc engine, gearbox, and limited slip.

required_evidence: ASN-certified copy if event HTP use is required.
next_action: Use S015 for research; obtain ASN-certified homologation copy for event use.

expected_or_lead_configuration: S015 verifies the homologated 1968 GT40 302 evolution as 101.6 mm bore, 76.2 mm stroke, 4942.16 cc / 302 cu in, with crankshaft part number C8FE-6300-A; installed block/crank are not verified.

required_evidence: Block casting/date, main-cap arrangement, bore, stroke, builder marks, crankshaft part, build sheet.
next_action: Inspect and photograph block/crank identifiers; measure bore/stroke if engine is apart.

expected_or_lead_configuration: S015 verifies a 1968 Ford GT 40 variant for Weslake aluminium cylinder heads, part number 3/3710; S024 adds official Gurney-Weslake identification context for Mark I-IV heads, design cues, and GT40 race-head versus road-head distinctions; installed heads are not verified.
label: verified_context_installed_open
required_evidence: Head casting/foundry marks, chamber/valve data, port form, rocker-cover details, manifold angle, repair records, Weslake/Gurney-Weslake documentation.
next_action: Inspect heads and record all marks before cleaning or machining; do not accept rocker covers alone as identity proof.

expected_or_lead_configuration: Lead sources commonly associate the 1968 4.9 L GT40 package with Weber carburetion; S018 provides an official Weber distributor support route for IDA identification and service parts, but installed carburetors remain unverified.
label: lead_with_verified_support_source
required_evidence: Carburetor model, series, serials, choke size, jet stack, linkage, fuel pressure source, diagrams/manuals for exact model.
next_action: Photograph and document carburetors before adjustment; if Weber IDA is verified, use S018 to obtain exact diagrams/service parts.

expected_or_lead_configuration: S015 verifies a base ZF 5-speed recognition entry and a 1968 evolution for Hewland LG600 5-speed with Ford heavy-duty limited-slip differential part number CDH4204A; S016 provides LG500/LG600 component manual context; installed unit not verified.
label: verified_context_installed_open
required_evidence: Transaxle plate, serial, case markings, gear count, LSD part/markings, service manual.
next_action: Identify installed unit before oil or setup advice; if Hewland LG600 is confirmed, use S016 for component workflow and cautions.

expected_or_lead_configuration: FIA Appendix J provides a four-wheel/fail-safe regulation baseline but no GT40-specific hydraulic settings.
label: verified
required_evidence: Caliper/disc/master-cylinder IDs, line routing, balance mechanism, component manuals.
next_action: Map brake system and inspect before pressure or bias changes.

expected_or_lead_configuration: FIA Appendix J makes suspension principle/function recognition-sensitive; S015 verifies independent front/rear suspension with coil springs but does not populate stabilizer, damper count/type, geometry, or setup values.

required_evidence: Pickup dimensions, shim packs, uprights, springs, dampers, bars, alignment as found.
next_action: Photograph and record as-found setup before disassembly; do not infer bars, dampers, ride height, or alignment from S015.

expected_or_lead_configuration: S015 includes wheel fields but does not populate type, weight, method of attachment, rim diameter, or rim width; wheel, center-lock, and tire settings are hardware-specific and currently unverified.

required_evidence: Wheel make/size/offset, peg drive, center-lock threads, tire model/date/construction.
next_action: Inspect and document before torque or pressure recommendations; do not infer wheel specs from S015.

expected_or_lead_configuration: S015 includes a fuel-tank capacity field and fuel-pump prompt, but the inspected copy does not populate actionable values; fuel pressure, pump, cell/tank, hose, and fire-safety settings are installation-specific.

expected_or_lead_configuration: S015 includes steering type, servo-assistance, lock-to-lock turns, and servo-assistance detail fields, but the inspected copy does not populate actionable values; installed rack/column/joint/stop geometry is not verified.

expected_or_lead_configuration: S019 captures current FIA Appendix K safety/event-readiness requirements for battery, circuit breaker, fuel/oil/brake line protection, fuel tank/foam/caps/lines, bulkheads, extinguishers, catch tanks, harnesses, warning lights, and black-dot safety-control procedure; installed safety package is not verified.

next_action: Create a safety-system evidence packet before race/event readiness claims.

expected_or_lead_configuration: S015 verifies GT40 recognition context for partly unitized steel chassis/body structure and fiberglass/steel coachwork, while S027 provides Ford design-history context; the installed tub, clips, materials, corrosion, prior repairs, and datum state are unverified.

component: fastened joints and workshop torque control
expected_or_lead_configuration: The captured source set does not provide a car-wide torque table; torque remains controlled by exact fastened joint, component identity, material, fastener specification, thread, lubrication, locking method, reuse rule, and applicable service source.
label: verified_boundary_installed_open
required_evidence: Exact joint location, component manual, fastener grade/material/thread, washer/nut/insert details, lubrication, locking compound, reuse/replace rule, torque sequence, and inspection condition.
next_action: Create a fastener capture record for each joint before applying or publishing torque values.
